4:T57a,(function(){var PARAM='__pd_reload';var KEY='privatedao-next-asset-recovery:'+(window.location.pathname||'/');function nextAsset(url){return typeof url==='string'&&url.indexOf('/_next/static/')!==-1;}function once(){try{if(window.sessionStorage.getItem(KEY)==='1'){return false;}window.sessionStorage.setItem(KEY,'1');return true;}catch(_){return true;}}function hardReload(){if(!once()){return;}var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.set(PARAM,String(Date.now()));window.location.replace(url.toString());}function maybeRecover(value){var message='';if(typeof value==='string'){message=value;}else if(value&&typeof value.message==='string'){message=value.message;}else if(value&&typeof value.reason==='string'){message=value.reason;}if(message.indexOf('ChunkLoadError')!==-1||message.indexOf('Loading CSS chunk')!==-1||message.indexOf('Failed to fetch dynamically imported module')!==-1){hardReload();}}window.addEventListener('error',function(event){var target=event.target;if(target&&nextAsset(target.src||target.href)){hardReload();}},true);window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection',function(event){maybeRecover(event.reason);});if(window.location.search.indexOf(PARAM+'=')!==-1){window.addEventListener('load',function(){var url=new URL(window.location.href);url.searchParams.delete(PARAM);window.history.replaceState(window.history.state,'',url.toString());},{once:true});}})();0:{"P":null,"c":["","viewer","mainnet-go-live-checklist",""],"q":"","i":false,"f":[[["",{"children":["viewer",{"children":[["slug","mainnet-go-live-checklist","c",null],{"children":["__PAGE__",{}]}]}]},"$undefined","$undefined",16],[["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","link","0",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/11fii1qfatvp_.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","link","1",{"rel":"stylesheet","href":"/_next/static/chunks/00~a4cfihy7j3.css","precedence":"next","crossOrigin":"$undefined","nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wi11rh25l7c_.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-1",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0shhd6kjmka31.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-2",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0f6kvf~_~fcr7.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-3",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01v-109x2_k5o.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-4",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0i.l9589uvx0j.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-5",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0is5p.edcm0hi.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-6",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0v5jhj7c24q78.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}],["$","script","script-7",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0j4pbljnny6-v.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]],["$","html",null,{"lang":"en","className":"space_grotesk_d7b50fc5-module__qeW00a__variable Program And Authority Controls"}]}],["$","$1","block-9",{"children":["$","p","p-37",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Before mainnet, authority handling must be explicit and hardened."}]}],["$","$1","block-10",{"children":["$","ul","l-45",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-45-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"upgrade authority is moved to an explicit multisig or governance-owned path"}],["$","li","l-45-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"treasury operator path is documented"}],["$","li","l-45-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"token admin path is documented"}],["$","li","l-45-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"authority rotation procedure is documented and rehearsed"}],["$","li","l-45-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"emergency ownership and veto authority are understood by operators"}]]}]}],["$","$1","block-11",{"children":["$","p","p-46",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Blocking condition:"}]}],["$","$1","block-12",{"children":["$","ul","l-50",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-50-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"do not cut over while a single personal key still acts as an unchecked production authority"}]]}]}],"$L23","$L24","$L25","$L26","$L27","$L28","$L29","$L2a","$L2b","$L2c","$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c","$L3d","$L3e","$L3f","$L40","$L41","$L42","$L43","$L44","$L45","$L46","$L47","$L48","$L49","$L4a","$L4b","$L4c","$L4d"]}]}]}]

37:["$","$1","block-33",{"children":["$","p","p-126",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Blocking condition:"}]}]

39:["$","$1","block-35",{"children":["$","h2","h2-133",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"7. ZK Boundary Decision"}]}]
3a:["$","$1","block-36",{"children":["$","p","p-136",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"The current stack anchors proposal-bound proof material on-chain, records parallel on-chain verification receipts in the legacy path, and keeps Groth16 witness generation and proving off-chain. The V2 strict security layer adds `DaoSecurityPolicy`, `ProposalExecutionPolicySnapshot`, `ProposalProofVerification`, threshold-attested proof records, canonical payload binding, and expiry checks."}]}]
3b:["$","$1","block-37",{"children":["$","p","p-138",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Before mainnet, be explicit about what is and is not claimed."}]}]
3c:["$","$1","block-38",{"children":["$","ul","l-150",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-150-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"on-chain proof anchors are verified"}],["$","li","l-150-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"on-chain parallel verification receipts are reviewed"}],["$","li","l-150-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"V2 strict proof policy is initialized for the target DAO when strict finalization is required"}],["$","li","l-150-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"any policy change after initialization is performed through `update_dao_security_policy_v2` and reviewed as monotonic, not a rollback"}],["$","li","l-150-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`ProposalExecutionPolicySnapshot` exists for proposals that will use V2 strict finalization"}],["$","li","l-150-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"proposal policy snapshots are treated as immutable object-level records once captured"}],["$","li","l-150-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"off-chain proof generation and proving flow are reviewed"}],["$","li","l-150-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"explorer-visible anchor path is documented"}],["$","li","l-150-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"operator messaging does not overstate the enforcement boundary"}]]}]}]
3d:["$","$1","block-39",{"children":["$","p","p-151",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Required outcome:"}]}]
3e:["$","$1","block-40",{"children":["$","ul","l-155",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-155-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"the team can state clearly which path is active: legacy proof anchoring, threshold-attested V2 strict finalization, or future cryptographic verifier CPI. Do not describe threshold attestation as cryptographic verification."}]]}]}]
3f:["$","$1","block-41",{"children":["$","h2","h2-158",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":"8. Confidential Settlement V2 Boundary"}]}]
40:["$","$1","block-42",{"children":["$","p","p-161",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Strict confidential payout execution is only mainnet-candidate when the V2 evidence path is active."}]}]
41:["$","$1","block-43",{"children":["$","ul","l-170",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-170-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`SettlementEvidence` exists for every strict confidential payout execution"}],["$","li","l-170-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`SettlementEvidence.status == Verified`"}],["$","li","l-170-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"settlement evidence binds to the DAO, proposal, payout plan, payout fields, and source-specific evidence kind"}],["$","li","l-170-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`SettlementConsumptionRecord` is created exactly once per evidence account"}],["$","li","l-170-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"evidence TTL and attestor policy are reviewed"}],["$","li","l-170-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"REFHE and MagicBlock trust boundaries are described as attested unless a cryptographic receipt or verifier CPI is integrated"}]]}]}]
42:["$","$1","block-44",{"children":["$","p","p-171",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"Blocking condition:"}]}]

4a:["$","$1","block-52",{"children":["$","p","p-207",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"PrivateDAO is ready for mainnet cutover only when all of the following are true:"}]}]
4b:["$","$1","block-53",{"children":["$","ul","l-219",{"className":"space-y-2 pl-5 text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":[["$","li","l-219-0",{"className":"list-disc","children":"repository verification passes"}],["$","li","l-219-1",{"className":"list-disc","children":"`npm run verify:mainnet-blockers` passes with all external blockers explicitly tracked"}],["$","li","l-219-2",{"className":"list-disc","children":"authority handling is hardened"}],["$","li","l-219-3",{"className":"list-disc","children":"external security review is complete"}],["$","li","l-219-4",{"className":"list-disc","children":"real-device wallet evidence exists"}],["$","li","l-219-5",{"className":"list-disc","children":"RPC and monitoring operations are prepared"}],["$","li","l-219-6",{"className":"list-disc","children":"treasury procedures are documented and rehearsed"}],["$","li","l-219-7",{"className":"list-disc","children":"ZK boundary language is honest and stable"}],["$","li","l-219-8",{"className":"list-disc","children":"release ceremony artifacts are current"}]]}]}]
